triggers: executive,minimal,clean,consulting,board,leadership,高管,极简,克制,咨询风,董事会
best_for: Board reports; strategy decks; decision memos; formal updates
avoid_for: Youth brands; entertainment launches; highly expressive campaigns
color_mood: White or near-white background; charcoal text; one restrained accent; high contrast
typography: Neutral sans; strong title hierarchy; few weights
layout_bias: Low to medium density; generous margins; single-message, comparison, summary
component_bias: Native text; subtle callouts; simple charts; sparse icons
effects: Static or subtle reveals; minimal shadows
avoid: Overdecorated gradients; emoji icons; tiny text; crowded cards

best_for: Product proposals; feature launches; customer demos; platform overview
avoid_for: Legal filings; conservative finance board packs

component_bias: Image-text; metric cards; process nodes; product screenshots

best_for: Technical architecture; AI platform; cybersecurity; developer tools
